needed_mathlib_context.expected_signature_or_shape: Nat.choose_mul_succ_eq (n k : ℕ) : n.choose k * (n + 1) = (n + 1).choose k * (n + 1 - k)
needed_mathlib_context.why_needed: Used to relate binomial coefficients with different n.

needed_mathlib_context.expected_signature_or_shape: Nat.succ_mul_choose_eq (n k : ℕ) : n.succ * n.choose k = n.succ.choose k.succ * k.succ
needed_mathlib_context.why_needed: Used to relate binomial coefficients with different k.

needed_mathlib_context.expected_signature_or_shape: Nat.choose_succ_succ (n k : ℕ) : n.succ.choose k.succ = n.choose k + n.choose k.succ
needed_mathlib_context.why_needed: Pascal's rule, may be used in the proof.

needed_mathlib_context.expected_signature_or_shape: Nat.choose_add_eq_choose_add_choose (a b n : ℕ) : (a+b).choose n = ∑ k in Finset.Icc 0 n, a.choose k * b.choose (n - k)
Nat.Partition.ext (p q : Nat.Partition n) (h : p.parts = q.parts) : p = q
NPartition.ext (μ ν : NPartition N) (h : μ.parts = ν.parts) : μ = ν
